## Checklist

- [ ] Change is scoped and focused.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed.
- [ ] Tests/checks pass locally.
- [ ] All code, prompts, tests, identifiers, and UI copy are original to this repository (clean-room provenance — see CONTRIBUTING.md).
